description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use. The main body and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a cylindrical magazine tube running parallel beneath the barrel. The wooden grip and fore-end provide a contrasting texture and color to the otherwise matte black finish of the metal components. The shotgun features a pump-action mechanism, with a visible pump handle located beneath the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized to fit a single finger, offering basic protection for the trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel, matte black metal body, and wooden pistol grip and fore-end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden grip, pump handle, and metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden grip and pump handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden grip and the back of the receiver, with the barrel extending away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
